# services.mobilizon

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.mobilizon`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.mobilizon.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Mobilizon federated organization and mobilization platform. |
| `services.mobilizon.nginx.enable` | `boolean` | Whether an Nginx virtual host should be set up to serve Mobilizon. |
| `services.mobilizon.package` | `package` | The mobilizon package to use. |
| `services.mobilizon.settings` | `open submodule of attribute set of attribute set of (Elixir value)` | Mobilizon Elixir documentation, see <https://docs.joinmobilizon.org/administration/configure/reference/> for supported values. |
| `services.mobilizon.settings.":mobilizon".":instance".email_from` | `string or (raw elixir)` | The email for the From: header in emails |
| `services.mobilizon.settings.":mobilizon".":instance".email_reply_to` | `string or (raw elixir)` | The email for the Reply-To: header in emails |
| `services.mobilizon.settings.":mobilizon".":instance".hostname` | `string or (raw elixir)` | Your instance's hostname |
| `services.mobilizon.settings.":mobilizon".":instance".name` | `string or (raw elixir)` | The fallback instance name if not configured into the admin UI |
| `services.mobilizon.settings.":mobilizon"."Mobilizon.Storage.Repo".database` | `null or string or (raw elixir)` | Name of the database |
| `services.mobilizon.settings.":mobilizon"."Mobilizon.Storage.Repo".socket_dir` | `null or string or (raw elixir)` | Path to the postgres socket directory. Set this to null if you want to connect to a remote database. If non-null, the local PostgreSQL server will be configured with the configured database, permissions, and required extensions. If connecting to a remote database, please follow the instructions on how to setup your database: <https://docs.joinmobilizon.org/administration/install/release/#database-setup> |
| `services.mobilizon.settings.":mobilizon"."Mobilizon.Storage.Repo".username` | `null or string or (raw elixir)` | User used to connect to the database |
| `services.mobilizon.settings.":mobilizon"."Mobilizon.Web.Endpoint".has_reverse_proxy` | `boolean or (raw elixir)` | Whether you use a reverse proxy |
| `services.mobilizon.settings.":mobilizon"."Mobilizon.Web.Endpoint".http.ip` | `(elixir tuple) or (raw elixir)` | The IP address to listen on. Defaults to [::1] notated as a byte tuple. |
| `services.mobilizon.settings.":mobilizon"."Mobilizon.Web.Endpoint".http.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive) or (raw elixir)` | The port to run the server |
| `services.mobilizon.settings.":mobilizon"."Mobilizon.Web.Endpoint".url.host` | `string or (raw elixir)` | Your instance's hostname for generating URLs throughout the app |
